rounds.purpose: Authenticate all personas and create/read one traceable object in every collaboration module.
Repeat reads and an idempotent IM submission without duplicate business state or count regression.
Verify expired/unauthorized access, restart the application service, then resume all six module checks.

stopConditions: Any confirmed permission disclosure or unexpected successful restricted request.
Any data loss, duplicate idempotent write, or unexplained object-count regression.
Application service does not recover after the controlled restart.
Any open P0 or P1 product failure.
limitations: No real participant activity or feedback is represented.
No satisfaction, adoption, learning, or organizational outcome may be inferred.
Passing this contract is not production release approval.
